summary: Completed the first ADR 0134 production live publication on top of the latest mainline by fixing the shared edge rsync key lookup, republishing the authenticated changelog and docs portals through nginx-lv3, and verifying that the deployed changelog artifact preserves the redacted history view.

verification.check: Focused changelog redaction and edge-publication regression coverage
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_changelog_portal.py tests/test_changelog_redaction.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py -q` completed with `16 passed in 1.17s`.

verification.check: Shared edge publication converge from latest main
verification.observed: Replaying `make docs`, `make generate-changelog-portal`, and `make configure-edge-publication` from the latest-main worktree completed successfully with `nginx-lv3 : ok=64 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=11`, including the generated static-site rsync step for both `changelog.lv3.org` and `docs.lv3.org`.

verification.check: Deployed portal artifact parity and redaction markers
verification.observed: The local and deployed SHA-256 digests matched for `/build/changelog-portal/index.html` and `/var/www/lv3-generated/changelog-portal/index.html` (`6c5137ca1e7f86208f847b35f1829f07f29f75ac812ff361581f1082fa2f405a`) and for the docs portal index (`4167fb19c44e9136fcab4777b6fcaf7da773d428c81de3c07cb7d734d9c0df28`); the deployed changelog index contained `redacted_count 2`.

verification.check: Authenticated public edge probes after publication
verification.observed: `curl -Ik https://changelog.lv3.org/` and `curl -Ik https://docs.lv3.org/` both returned HTTP `302` to the shared `/oauth2/sign_in` flow with the expected HSTS, CORP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP, and `X-Robots-Tag` headers.

notes: Current `origin/main` still had a regression in `nginx_edge_publication` where the delegated rsync path expected `playbook_execution_secret_manifest` inside the role scope. Commit `3b928bcabccc1df09fd9242f190d068316f8c2e0` switched the task to the active `ansible_private_key_file` with a guarded manifest fallback before the successful latest-main live replay.

The latest mainline tip already cut `VERSION 0.171.0` without updating `versions/stack.yaml`, so this integration normalizes the repo version, release notes index, stack versioning block, and latest public-edge receipt while recording the ADR 0134 live publication.
